Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class MembershipExtractor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.AbstractExtractor
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.MembershipExtractor
public class MembershipExtractor extends AbstractExtractor
Extract useful membership predicates from a set of hypotheses. Usefulness means having the given expression as left-hand side. Predicates can be either a given hypothesis or some predicate derived soundly from a hypothesis.
